calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Appointment Of Appraiser
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Appointment Of Appraiser
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Continued To Feb-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Kimberly Fanady, Esq. 415-986-8467 for Plaintiff. (In-person)
Richard Zuromski Jr. 415-869-8837 Seifert Zuromski for Defendant.

Hearing is held. Tthe Court announces the issue whether the Court should orde the appointment of a third estimator. ARGUED. Mr. Zuromski informs the court a client is deceased and his estate is in France; requests to continue matter for 60 days to wait for the administration of the estate. Ms. Fanady informs the court no one has signed the agreement, ready to move forward, "Mr. Spate" as third appraiser. After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONERs CLAUDIA LAIR, and TONIA LAIR's Motion For Order Requiring Appointment Of Appraiser.

Continued to 2/27/26 at 9:00am in Dept. 302. The Court states it is possible the court may issue an OSC on the LLC and encourages parties to resolve the matter. Mr. Zuromski to inform clients of what transpired at the hearing today.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
